channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: louis-e /arnis | Rust | N/A
item.description: Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

item.description: A framework for efficient model inference with omni-modality models

item.title: protocolbuffers /protobuf | C++ | N/A
item.description: Protocol Buffers - Google's data interchange format

item.title: jarrodwatts /claude-hud | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

item.title: opendataloader-project /opendataloader-pdf | Java | N/A
item.description: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Automate PDF accessibility. Open-source.

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: aquasecurity /trivy | Go | N/A
item.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

item.title: systemd /systemd | C | N/A
item.description: The systemd System and Service Manager
